'''Wistril''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Wistril system/Legends|Wistril system]], located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was known for its [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]].

==History==
Wistril was a planet where the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] stopped to take on supplies. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] hijacked a supply [[Shuttle 37|shuttle]] on the planet in order to rescue [[Talon Karrde]] from the ''Chimaera''{{'s}} detention block. A decade later, Skywalker encountered [[Pinchers]] on the world.

The planet remained under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control even after the death of the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]] at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. Eventually the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] drove Imperial forces from the system following Admiral [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon's]] failed offensive against the Republic.<ref name="Atlas" />

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] the planet was conquered by the extra-galactic [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. The [[Imperial Remnant]] would later rout the Yuuzhan Vong from the system shortly after the aliens' failed attack on Imperial space.<ref name="Atlas" />

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places Wistril in the [[Farrfin sector/Legends|Farfin Sector]], a misspelling of the true Farrfin Sector. It is actually located in the Fath sector.
